headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. DO NOT use Inter. Use tracking-tight for H1/H2.

body.usage: Use for all body text, descriptions, and UI labels.

mono.usage: Use for typing stats (WPM, Accuracy), timer countdown, and code/data blocks.

layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
layout_spacing.candidate_grid: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Welcome screen section previews. Wide gaps (gap-8).
layout_spacing.admin_grid: Mode B (Control Room Grid) for Admin Dashboard. Dense gaps (gap-6).
layout_spacing.borders_radius: Subtle roundness. max 8px (rounded-lg) for both portals.

surfaces.candidate_header: Glassmorphism: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/20, shadow-sm.
surfaces.admin_cards: Flat solid: bg-[#16161E], 1px border border-[#2D2D3B], no default shadow. Hover: translate-y-[-2px] with glow.

motion_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth fade between questions using framer-motion (opacity 0 to 1, y 10 to 0).
motion_interactions.timer_animation: At 10s: #FF9500. At 5 seconds: text and stroke change to red (#FF3B30) and pulse using CSS keyframes.
motion_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and interactive cards must lift slightly and change border/bg color.
motion_interactions.typing_indicator: 3 dots bouncing animation for AI chat typing state.

shadcn_overrides: Forms: Heavily customize inputs to use #534AB7 for focus rings.
Cards: Remove default heavy shadows, rely on 1px borders.
custom_elements: Circular Countdown Timer: SVG based circle with stroke-dashoffset animation.
Live Transcript Box: Scrollable div with JetBrains Mono, auto-scroll to bottom.
AI Chat: Grey bubble left, #534AB7 bubble right.
Audio Visualizer: Small animated bars for voice recording active state.

testing_accessibility.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g. data-testid='start-test-button').
testing_accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #534AB7 meets 4.5:1 ratio.

candidate_hero_bg.description: Subtle abstract frosted glass background in purple

admin_login_bg.description: Deep obsidian background with subtle purple light bleed

candidate_exam_focus.placement: Candidate Welcome Screen visual accent or side image

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React+Vite or Next.js app with Tailwind CSS.
Do NOT ask for clarification. Implement everything based on these guidelines.
Create the specific portals under separate route structures (e.g., / for candidate, /admin for admin).
Candidate portal must strictly adhere to the Light theme colors.
Admin portal must strictly adhere to the Dark theme colors.
Implement the circular countdown timer accurately with the specified color transitions.
Import Work Sans, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy images. Use the provided media URLs.
